issue: MATLAB command executes temp runner (run('%RUNNER_ABS_PATH_MATLAB%')) instead of requested script path; script body is never entered
SCRIPT_PATH_MATLAB is computed but never used in the MATLAB command path

FailValidation emits WARN and returns; validator exits PASS path and is effectively non-blocking
CHECK_DRIFT can set block=true in canonical state, but currently surfaces as warning due non-terminating FailValidation
